creator: redchrom@gmail.com
text:
bfe driver dosen't support suspend/resume device methods and system with
loaded bfe driver don't want to resume.

I've added some basic functions to the driver, but it dosen't help. Linux
driver just detach a device on suspend and attach on resume - on FreeBSD
only detaching success. Normal FreeBSD routines like stoping and resetting
on suspend/resume dosen't help. As I see in Linux network cards usually
dosen't dettach/attach on syspend/resume but with this driver does, so
maybe we should play with it?

Here is my dmesg:

-s 3) system.
